news.title: U.S. is allowing Iranian oil tankers through Strait of Hormuz, says Bessent
news.summary: The White House believes tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz will increase before Navy escorts are deployed, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said.

news.title: Bessent says Treasury is not intervening in oil commodities markets and has no authority to do so
news.summary: Bessent addressed rumors that the Treasury Department or some other arm of government might step in to try to lower oil prices. Bessent: "I don't think that's the way to go"

news.title: Nebius jumps 14% after inking $27 billion infrastructure deal with Meta
news.summary: Meta is planning capital expenditure of up to $135 billion related to AI this year. The company is planning to spend more than $100 billion on AI-related research and development in 2014.

news.title: Trump-Xi China summit may be delayed if Trump wants to stay in Washington for Iran war: Bessent
news.summary: Trump's visit would be the first for a U.S. president since he went to the country in 2017. Trump's visit is scheduled for March 31-April 2.

news.title: These women pursued a skilled trade — here's what they told us about their experience in a male-dominated world
news.summary: The skilled trades can offer opportunities for employment growth and higher salaries, potentially narrowing the gender wage gap. The skilled trades are a growing sector in the U.S.

news.title: These parents retired in their 30s and 40s while raising young kids. Here’s how they pulled it off.
news.summary: A new generation of money-minded parents is urging young people who want to start families to map a path to early financial independence so they can prioritize their families.

news.title: Soaring gas and energy prices could ‘completely eat up’ your bigger tax refund if the Iran conflict continues
news.summary: Refunds are almost 11% higher than the same point last year, the IRS said. Refunds for the first half of the year are up 11% over the same time last year.

news.title: I’m 37 and won a settlement. I maxed out my IRA. How do I invest the $21,000 I have left?
news.summary: “I would love for this money to buy me some more freedom,” he says. ”I would like to be able to do what I want to do.”

news.title: Meta may lay off 20% of staff while making two big statements about AI
news.summary: The company reportedly plans mass layoffs as it sees productivity benefits from AI. The company faces investor pressure to offset its heavy spending on AI.

news.title: Is a $130 Costco executive membership the new VIP status symbol?
news.summary: Executive membership has grown by 9.1% to nearly 40 million. The social-media stars are celebrating it in a viral video. The video was created to celebrate the company's 40th anniversary.
